Added_Graphics.purpose: Provides developers with insights to optimize graphics performance and enhance visual quality.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagRenderDecalUseColorMapProperties2_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Enhances how decals utilize color mapping properties in rendering.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Improves the visual quality of decals, making them look better on surfaces.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FFlagChatUniverseConfigurationParseShortCircuit
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Optimizes chat configuration processing by skipping unnecessary checks.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Improves chat performance and reduces delays in message delivery.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FFlagUIDragDetectorFixEventPositionIgnoreGuiInset3
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Fixes the event position calculations in the UI drag detector to ignore GUI insets.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Provides a more accurate dragging experience for players, making UI interactions smoother.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FIntSduiCreateSduiFeedStoreLogDelayMs
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Sets a delay for logging actions in the SDUI feed store.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Improves data handling efficiency, enhancing user experience.

Added_Input.name: FFlagUseBirthdayDropdownForGamepad6
Added_Input.mechanism: Adds a dropdown menu for birthday selection when using Gamepad 6.
Added_Input.purpose: Makes it easier for players to enter their birthday using a game controller.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Links to a dynamic string that represents the current version of the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows players to benefit from the latest updates and features based on the current code version.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings handle timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures accurate display of time-related information in games.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagEnableCreatePartyNudge
Changed_Other.mechanism: Prompts users to create parties within the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Encourages social interaction and teamwork among players.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagLuaAppRemoveEDPLoadingState
Changed_Other.mechanism: Removes a specific loading state in the Lua application.
Changed_Other.purpose: Streamlines the loading process, making games start faster for players.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagUseTCUserTileForTCChatCard
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a new user tile design for chat cards in the Team Create feature.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the visual appearance of user profiles in chat, making it more engaging.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks the specific version of the codebase using a Git hash.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers manage updates and ensure consistency in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling by using a faster timestamp format.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and speed of string operations in games.

Removed_Physics.purpose: Ensures smoother updates and fewer disruptions for players when changes are made to games.
